title: Before the Queen Elizabeth II Cup

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the race arrives. With her own debut
approaching, Daiwa Scarlet watches from the
stands next to Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere at this year's Queen Elizabeth II
Cup feels different, and both feel as if something
amazing is about to unfold.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, immediately before the race, Sweep
Tosho trades determined boasts with Kawakami
Princess and the others.
